response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: JSON correctly identified no vocal music (songs). Chants are present but required manual transcription. 2. JSON Usage: Reference JSON used to confirm lack of official lyrics; manual transcription performed for crowd chants and visual announcement text. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed prominent visual announcement screens and grouped rhythmic crowd chants into logical blocks to balance precision with readability.

subtitles.original: 開演まで、いましばらくお待ちください。
subtitles.english: The concert will be starting soon.

subtitles.original:
Attention For Visitors
演出の都合上、フラッシュ・強力な光を放つ機器の使用はご遠慮ください。
声出し・応援、大歓迎です！
subtitles.english:
Attention For Visitors
Please refrain from using flashes or strong lights for production reasons.
Vocal cheering and support are welcome!
